#ZONE DATA = 1

	#ZONE NUMBER = 0
		#NAME = UNSET
		#X POS = 0
		#Y POS = 0
		#WIDTH = 40
		#HEIGHT = 26
		#ID TYPE = GAME_ROOM_ZONE
		#UID = 0

#END OF ZONE DATA

#SPAWN POINT DATA = 0
#END OF SPAWN POINT DATA

#AI ZONE GATE DATA = 0

#END OF AI ZONE GATE DATA

#AI ZONE REMOTE DATA = 0

#END OF AI ZONE REMOTE DATA

#AI NODE DATA = 0

#END OF AI NODE DATA

#END OF FILE
